overview: School Ledger ERP is a comprehensive, server-centric school management system for Indian schools. All data is stored in MySQL on cPanel hosting and syncs across all devices in real time. It covers all school operations: student management, fees collection (INR), attendance (RFID/QR/biometric), examinations, HR/payroll, transport, inventory, communication (WhatsApp), chat, certificates, alumni, reports, and more — all in a fast, mobile-optimized PWA.
features: Full cPanel/MySQL backend — all data saved to server, syncs across every device in real time
20+ modules: Students, Fees, Attendance, HR/Payroll, Academics, Transport, Inventory, Exams, Chat, Communication, Certificates, Reports
Excel-style grids with rich filters, bulk actions, import/export for students and staff
Fees collection with auto-month selection, receipt generation (4 templates), QR code receipts, balance carry-forward
WhatsApp auto-reply bot — parents send admission number, receive attendance + fees summary
Role-based permissions: Super Admin, Admin, Teacher, Parent, Student, Driver, Accountant, Librarian
PWA — installable on Android/iOS, mobile bottom navigation, offline support
Fast performance: skeleton loading, parallel data fetches, 50-record pagination, client-side cache
Chat system: DMs between any users, auto-generated class/section/route groups, file sharing
Complete documentation and cPanel deployment guide included
